source_pr.title: privilege/privileges: use pattern match to check dbRecord in mysql.db
source_pr.body:
```
grant all privileges on `te%`.* to 'user'@'host';
```

This will create a record in mysql.db, all databases with name prefix 'te'
(such as 'test', 'temp') will be available to 'user'@'host'

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: privilege/privileges: use pattern match to check dbRecord in mysql.db.
fix_pattern: privilege/privileges: use pattern match to check dbRecord in mysql.db
